name: Compaction Equipment
description: Vibratory rollers and compaction equipment for asphalt, soil, and road construction projects.

machines.name: BOMAG BW 65 H Walk-Behind Vibratory Roller
machines.shortDescription: Compact walk-behind double drum vibratory roller for asphalt and soil compaction. Ideal for small to medium construction projects, sidewalks, driveways, and repair work.
machines.description: Compact walk-behind double drum vibratory roller for asphalt and soil compaction. Ideal for small to medium construction projects, sidewalks, driveways, and repair work. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Honda GX390 reliable petrol engine
Double drum vibratory design
15 kN centrifugal force for effective compaction
Compact size for tight spaces
60 L water tank for drum wetting
Ideal for sidewalks, driveways, and patch work

machines.name: BOMAG BW 90 AD Ride-On Tandem Vibratory Roller
machines.shortDescription: Small ride-on double drum asphalt roller for road construction, parking lots, and repair work. Articulated steering for maneuverability.
machines.description: Small ride-on double drum asphalt roller for road construction, parking lots, and repair work. Articulated steering for maneuverability. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Ride-on operator comfort
Articulated steering for tight maneuverability
42 kN centrifugal force
Kubota diesel engine for efficiency
Dual 180 L water tanks
30% gradeability for slopes

machines.name: BOMAG BPR 35/60 Reversible Plate Compactor
machines.shortDescription: Reversible vibratory plate compactor with Honda GX160 engine delivering 35 kN centrifugal force. Ideal for trench compaction, granular soils, and interlocking pavers.
machines.description: Reversible vibratory plate compactor with Honda GX160 engine delivering 35 kN centrifugal force. Ideal for trench compaction, granular soils, and interlocking pavers. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Reversible drive for maneuvering in tight trenches
Honda GX160 commercial-grade petrol engine
35 kN centrifugal force suitable for granular and mixed soils
Compact 350mm plate width fits narrow excavations
Durable cast base plate with reinforced edges
Low hand-arm vibration (HAV) levels for operator comfort

machines.name: Mikasa MTX-60E Tamping Rammer
machines.shortDescription: Lightweight petrol-powered tamping rammer with 13 kN impact force and 650 blows per minute. Designed for cohesive soils, clay, and trench backfill compaction.
machines.description: Lightweight petrol-powered tamping rammer with 13 kN impact force and 650 blows per minute. Designed for cohesive soils, clay, and trench backfill compaction. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Optimized for cohesive and clay soils with high impact per blow
Self-cleaning shoe prevents mud and clay build-up during operation
Lightweight 60 kg design for easy transport between lifts
Low-maintenance Robin EH12 engine with proven field reliability
Narrow 285mm shoe fits confined trench work and footings
50 cm compaction depth in a single pass on cohesive material

machines.name: Wacker Neuson BS60-4s Vibratory Rammer
machines.shortDescription: High-performance 2-stroke vibratory rammer with tool-less shoe change and integrated oil injection. Excels in clay, silt, and cohesive soil compaction up to 55 cm depth.
machines.description: High-performance 2-stroke vibratory rammer with tool-less shoe change and integrated oil injection. Excels in clay, silt, and cohesive soil compaction up to 55 cm depth. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Tool-less shoe change system — swap shoes in under 2 minutes
Integrated oil injection eliminates manual fuel mixing errors
55 cm compaction depth in cohesive and clay soil conditions
Low-vibration guide handle with four-point dampening system
Wacker Neuson 2-stroke engine tuned for high ambient temperatures
Narrow 280mm shoe ideal for utility trenches and pipe bedding

machines.name: Husqvarna LF 75 LAT Forward Plate Compactor
machines.shortDescription: Forward-plate compactor with 400mm wide base plate and Honda engine. Suitable for sand, gravel, and asphalt patchwork with optional water tank for hot-mix finishing.
machines.description: Forward-plate compactor with 400mm wide base plate and Honda engine. Suitable for sand, gravel, and asphalt patchwork with optional water tank for hot-mix finishing. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Wide 400mm base plate for faster coverage on paths and driveways
Honda GX160 engine with proven hot-weather reliability in Gulf conditions
Optional integrated water tank for hot-mix asphalt finishing work
Foldable guide handle for compact transport between job sites
Low noise 85 Hz frequency for reduced operator fatigue over long shifts
Forward-only design with fewer moving parts than reversible models

machines.name: JCB VMT 260-120 Tandem Vibratory Roller
machines.shortDescription: Articulated tandem vibratory roller with 1,200mm drum width and pressurized water spray. Designed for asphalt finishing, driveways, and road repair at 2,600 kg.
machines.description: Articulated tandem vibratory roller with 1,200mm drum width and pressurized water spray. Designed for asphalt finishing, driveways, and road repair at 2,600 kg. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Compaction Depth: Up to 30 cm on granular soil

180 L pressurized water spray prevents asphalt pickup on hot drums
Kubota diesel engine with excellent parts availability across the UAE

machines.name: Dynapac CA250D Single Drum Vibratory Roller
machines.shortDescription: Heavy single-drum vibratory roller with 125 HP Cummins diesel and 2,130mm drum. Built for large-scale soil compaction, embankments, and sub-base preparation at 250 kN force.
machines.description: Heavy single-drum vibratory roller with 125 HP Cummins diesel and 2,130mm drum. Built for large-scale soil compaction, embankments, and sub-base preparation at 250 kN force. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

2,130 mm drum with automatic drum scrapers for clean compaction
Enclosed ROPS/FOPS cabin with air conditioning for UAE summer work
50% gradeability handles steep embankments and ramp compaction

machines.name: Weber CR 3 Reversible Plate Compactor
machines.shortDescription: Reversible plate compactor with Honda GX200 engine and 30 kN force. Wide 450mm plate covers more area per pass — rated for granular soil, paving, and trench backfill.

machines.name: Wacker Neuson DPU6555 Diesel Reversible Plate Compactor
machines.shortDescription: Heavy-duty diesel reversible plate compactor with Hatz 1B30 engine and 65 kN centrifugal force. Built for deep-lift compaction, large trenches, and infrastructure earthworks at 490 kg.
machines.description: Heavy-duty diesel reversible plate compactor with Hatz 1B30 engine and 65 kN centrifugal force. Built for deep-lift compaction, large trenches, and infrastructure earthworks at 490 kg. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
